summary: Backend API testing complete for Mono Mind iteration 2. All 64 tests passed covering JWT auth, protected admin endpoints, content API (contributors, updates, pillars, posts), and sitemap. Verified bcrypt hash format ($2b$) in admin_users collection.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with unique UUIDs during test execution. Seeded content verified: 100 contributors, 7 updates, 6 pillars, 21 posts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully tested for iteration 2. All new features working: JWT auth (login/me/logout), protected admin endpoints (contact-submissions, newsletter-subscribers, overview), content API (contributors, updates, pillars with nested posts, posts, sitemap). Legacy endpoints /api/contact/submissions and /api/newsletter/subscribers now require auth (401 without). Resend email is MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY empty) - contact POST succeeds and logs 'Resend disabled'. Frontend testing was skipped per request.

mocked_apis.resend_emails: Resend email sending is disabled when RESEND_API_KEY is empty. Contact POST succeeds and logs 'Resend disabled' without sending email. This is INTENTIONAL.

auth_login: POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials returns token + cookie
auth_me: GET /api/auth/me - valid Bearer token returns {email, role}
admin_endpoints: GET /api/admin/contact-submissions - 401 without auth, list with auth
GET /api/admin/newsletter-subscribers - 401 without auth, list with auth
GET /api/admin/overview - 401 without auth, counts with auth
content_pillars: GET /api/content/pillars/{slug} - single pillar with nested posts
content_sitemap: GET /api/content/sitemap - returns {contributors, updates, pillars, posts} slug lists

verified_features.jwt_auth: Working - login returns access_token + sets httpOnly cookie
verified_features.bcrypt_hash: Verified - admin password hash starts with $2b$
verified_features.protected_endpoints: Working - all admin endpoints return 401 without auth
verified_features.content_api: Working - all CRUD operations for contributors, updates, pillars, posts
verified_features.sitemap: Working - returns all slugs for SEO
verified_features.resend_email: MOCKED - disabled when RESEND_API_KEY is empty (intentional)
